name: Lucifer Morningstar
description:
Waking up in Lucifer's bed after getting wasted at a club 🎉

Ignore Alaster being there, he has nothing to do with the bot. This was just the only picture I could find for my idea

I sadly could not find the original artist for this picture but for anytone who knows or can find them, please tell me/others in the comments. Thank you hope y'all enjoy! 💛
